# Case export-type-imported: Step 1

## Changed Files
- bar.css

## Asset Files
- Bundle: bundle.js
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 28
- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 737

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main"],"r":[],"m":[]}
```


## Update


### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./bar.css
- ./foo.css

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {
"./bar.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
var exports = {
  "bar-v2": "bar_css-bar-v2",
};
__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = Object.assign({}, exports));
module.exports.default = ".bar_css-bar-v2 {\n\tcolor: bar-updated;\n}";


},
"./foo.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
var exports = {
  "foo": "foo_css-foo",
};
__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = Object.assign({}, exports));
module.exports.default = ".bar_css-bar-v2 {\n\tcolor: bar-updated;\n}\n\n.foo_css-foo {\n\tcolor: foo;\n}";


},

},function(__webpack_require__) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__webpack_require__.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```
